tasks.title: Implement planner agent for task decomposition
tasks.description: Create a Go module that sends the codebase summary and feature prompt to the HuggingFace LLM endpoint, parses the JSON response into task structs, and handles errors.
tasks.design_notes: Define an Agent interface with a Plan method; use context with timeout and a retry wrapper for robustness.

tasks.title: Add devdive.json state management layer
tasks.description: Implement atomic read/write of devdive.json with struct validation, versioning, and a thread‑safe in‑memory cache for fast access by watchers and server.
tasks.design_notes: Wrap state in a singleton struct protected by sync.RWMutex and expose Get/Update methods that also trigger file‑watch events.

tasks.title: Integrate GitHub Issues and Contents API
tasks.description: Write functions to create, update, and close GitHub issues from task data and to commit/push devdive.json using the Contents API, handling token auth and rate limits.
tasks.design_notes: Separate GitHub client into a reusable package; batch issue creation to respect API limits and use ETag for optimistic concurrency on devdive.json commits.

tasks.title: Develop file and git watchers with LLM commit analysis
tasks.description: Use fsnotify for filesystem changes and a git log poller to detect new commits, send diffs to the LLM, and update task progress in devdive.json.
tasks.design_notes: Run watchers in separate goroutines communicating via channels; cache last processed commit SHA to avoid re‑analysis.

tasks.title: Add design review and nudge generation logic
tasks.description: Implement periodic (every 10 commits) and on‑demand design reviews that compare changed files against original design notes, classify drift, and append actionable nudges.
tasks.design_notes: Create a ReviewEngine struct that reuses the planner LLM; store findings in devdive.json and emit WebSocket events for the dashboard.

tasks.title: Set up Go HTTP server with WebSocket hub and embed frontend
tasks.description: Build the server to serve the embedded Preact build, manage WebSocket connections, and broadcast state updates from watchers to all clients.
tasks.design_notes: Use gorilla/websocket with a hub pattern; embed the dist folder via go:embed and serve it under /static, ensuring graceful shutdown.

commits.summary: Update .gitignore to include devdive.json and related paths
Enhanced planner agent with multi-attempt LLM calls and robust JSON parsing
Remove bundled frontend JS asset from server distribution
Add .gitignore with .env and node_modules entries

Updated Sidebar component styling, added project initials avatar, and revised navigation routes
Add SETUP.md documenting installation, build, and environment requirements
Add sync CLI entry point invoking ExecuteSync with state path
Add a new CLI entry point for the run command
Update .gitignore to include dev-dive-sandbox and package-lock.json, remove internal/server/dist/
Update README with installation guide, binary list, and command usage details
Update .gitignore to exclude devdive.json and compiled server assets
Enhanced git watcher diff extraction and updated setup docs for install scripts.
Refactored Sidebar component styling and routes, switched header to aside layout
Adds a new status CLI binary to display devdive.json state
Add PowerShell scripts to build Go binaries and install DevDive with frontend embedding
Add compiled frontend JavaScript asset for embedded server
Add GitHub API helpers to fetch current devdive.json state and retrieve issue details
Add CLI with init, run, sync, status, review, and rollback commands
Refactored main.go to delegate to internal CLI package, removing direct command implementations
